nodes.label: Concept: Tokenize Reddit Posts as SPL Tokens
Rationale: Simplified Project Structure (removed packages/ folder)

implements Meteora DBC pool creation and swap operations
fetches and validates Reddit posts for tokenization

falls back to posts for initial/current price
